birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs primarily at elevations of 5,740–11,320 ft, most commonly between 6,890 and 8,860 ft. The species inhabits montane and upper montane forest, including forest edges, secondary growth, and adjacent scrubby vegetation
